step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint) centered on a white background, with the headline 'Ask your pharmacist about ZONNIC.' in navy blue sans-serif text above. Regulatory warnings are present at the top (bilingual) and bottom. The ZONNIC logo on the tin has a navy blue circular halo behind the C only; no halos are present behind other letters.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint) centered on a white background, with the headline 'Ask your pharmacist about ZONNIC.' in navy blue sans-serif text above. Regulatory warnings are present at the top (bilingual) and bottom. The ZONNIC logo on the tin has a navy blue circular halo behind the C only; no halos are present behind other letters.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin), also in headline text (center/top)
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (headline), large (on product tin)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: navy blue (matches brand primary)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: navy blue
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: Solid white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top edge (bilingual block)
    Text: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. / Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom edge

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: headline and body text are bold sans-serif; product tin uses bold sans-serif for ZONNIC logo
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: Ask your pharmacist about ZONNIC. This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: secondary colour (mint/grey) is used sparingly as accent on product tin

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary:
The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint) centered on a solid white background, with the headline 'Ask your pharmacist about ZONNIC.' in navy blue bold sans-serif text above. The ZONNIC logo is visible on the tin, with navy blue text and a circular navy blue halo behind the C only; no halos are present behind other letters. The nicotine warning statement is present at the top in both English and French, and the required risk communication text is at the bottom. The overall colour palette is navy blue and white, with mint/grey accents on the tin. The logo is correctly proportioned, and the typeface is consistent with brand standards.

However, the C halo is a solid colour rather than a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds for educational content. Most critically, the 18+ age restriction icon is missing, which is a legal requirement for all marketing materials. While the image is otherwise visually compliant and uses approved colours and typography, the absence of the 18+ icon is a critical regulatory failure and must be corrected before use.

checks_performed.detail: Nicotine warning statement is present at the top in both English and French.
18+ age restriction icon is not present in the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is present on the product tin and in the headline text.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
C halo is present, circular, navy blue, and properly sized with no distortion or outline.
Logo is unmodified, with no gradients in text, outlines, or distortion.
Background is solid white, not a gradient or image.
No gradient background is present in the image.
Educational content should use a grey background, but this image uses solid white.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, white, mint/grey accent) are used.
Santral or similar bold sans-serif font is used throughout.
Educational content should use a grey gradient background at 50% opacity on white, but this image uses solid white.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
No issues with halo blending, flavour mismatch, or logo in shapes.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: The 18+ age restriction icon is missing from the image, which is a legal requirement.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the circular 18+ icon to the bottom of the image, near the risk communication text.
violations.evidence: No 18+ icon is visible anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo is a solid navy blue colour on a white background, but it should be a gradient using both primary and secondary colours.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use a gradient (navy blue to mint/grey) instead of a solid colour.
violations.evidence: The C halo on the tin is a solid colour, not a gradient, on a white background.

violations.rule_text: Educational content must leverage the grey background and secondary colours in a purposeful manner (as accents only).
violations.issue: The background is solid white instead of the required grey gradient for educational content.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the background to the signature grey gradient at 50% opacity on white.
violations.evidence: The image background is solid white.

violations.rule_text: The signature grey gradient background is created from an image. It MUST be used on creatives at 50% opacity on a white background.
violations.issue: The required grey gradient background is missing; the image uses solid white instead.
violations.fix_suggestion: Apply the signature grey gradient at 50% opacity over the white background.
violations.evidence: Background is solid white, not a grey gradient.
